The '''DH77 headcomm''',<ref name="Gadgets" /> also known as the '''DH77 comlink''', was a type of [[comlink]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation]]. They were fitted to the [[Galactic Empire]]'s [[stormtrooper]] [[helmet]]s, but were later removed after the Empire discovered that the comlink's signal could be jammed by high-energy particles. As artillery explosions and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter|TIE fighters]] produced emissions that generated such effects, it often affected Imperial operations.<ref name="BMF 64" /> As a result, following the [[Battle of Yavin]], the Empire began replacing the DH77 with [[Herzfall Corporation]]'s [[DH107]], which boosted power to mitigate the vulnerabilities of the DH77.<ref name="Gadgets" />

{{Tech-stub}}
